projects.title: HEAL Security Platform
projects.description: Zero hand-off DevOps environment and complete SDLC ownership for a healthcare cybersecurity threat intelligence startup. Engineered v1 platform from the ground up.

projects.title: Toca Social Scheduling Engine
projects.description: Architected and delivered the scheduling system front end for an interactive football penalty shootout game. Integrated website booking journeys and reception desk modules.

projects.title: Margin Trading Simulator
projects.description: Built an interactive module simulating margin trading mechanics for beginners. Featured prominently on the TradeNation platform homepage with high-fidelity physics and animations.

projects.title: E-Commerce Component Library
projects.description: Developed generic, high-performance React component libraries and e-commerce checkout journeys consumed by diverse client frontends in a fast-paced Scrum environment.

projects.title: Commercial On-boarding Portal
projects.description: Engineered scalable front-end components and a Node.js database adapter for document upload and origination portals within the Commercial On-boarding lab.

projects.title: SERN Stack FM Gateway
projects.description: Built a robust gateway system allowing clients to log, track, and monitor expenditure on facilities management jobs. Deployed iterative updates to the engineer's mobile app.

experience.description: Led the front-end development for a healthcare cybersecurity threat intelligence platform (HEAL Security Desktop and Vitals) from inception to v1. Established a zero hand-off devops environment.
Led a team to build the front-end scheduling system for an interactive penalty shootout game. Also developed the reception desk system and headless CMS-driven website booking journey.
Developed a heavily-animated tool to demonstrate margin trading principles for beginners, prominently featured on the company's homepage.
Developed e-commerce checkout journeys and a generic React component library consumed by various client UIs in an agile setting.
Delivered components for the Commercial On-boarding web front end and Product Origination portal. Created a Node database adapter for document management.
Built a SERN stack gateway for logging/tracking facilities management jobs and expenditure. Delivered iterations of the company engineer's app.
